calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Patrick Heard.
John Zanghi, Esq. for for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Tamia Graham, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Noah Petrowski.
EXH.1 - Lease/Rental Agreement -------------------ID/EVID.
EXH.2 - 3-Day Notice to Quit ---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 988 Howard St., #713, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Costs $195.00.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Off Calendar
